## Skill testing evidence

<!-- Required when adding or changing a skill. Delete this section for tooling/docs-only changes. -->

- [ ] Baseline: ran the scenario without the skill and it failed (paste or link the failure)
- [ ] With the skill present, the same scenario passes
- [ ] `node scripts/validate.mjs` passes with zero errors
- [ ] `node --test scripts/validate.test.mjs` passes
